attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
Request_number as BK_REQUEST_NUM,
 NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
 HEADER_ID AS SK_HEADER_ID_INT,
 ( CASE WHEN MOVE_ORDER_TYPE =1 THEN 'Requisition'
           WHEN MOVE_ORDER_TYPE =2 THEN 'Replenishment'
           WHEN MOVE_ORDER_TYPE =3 THEN 'Pick Wave'
           WHEN MOVE_ORDER_TYPE=4 THEN 'Receipt' 
           WHEN MOVE_ORDER_TYPE =5 THEN 'Manufacturing Pick' 
           WHEN MOVE_ORDER_TYPE =6 THEN 'Put Away' 
           WHEN MOVE_ORDER_TYPE =8 THEN 'Reservation' 
          ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS MOVE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
          ( CASE WHEN HEADER_STATUS =1 THEN 'Incomplete'
	             WHEN HEADER_STATUS =2 THEN 'Pending Approval'
	             WHEN HEADER_STATUS =3 THEN 'Approved'
	             WHEN HEADER_STATUS=4 THEN 'Not Approved' 
	             WHEN HEADER_STATUS =5 THEN 'Closed' 
	             WHEN HEADER_STATUS =6 THEN 'Canceled' 
	             WHEN HEADER_STATUS =7 THEN 'Pre Approved' 
	             WHEN HEADER_STATUS =8 THEN 'Partially Approved' 
	             WHEN HEADER_STATUS =9 THEN 'Canceled by Source' 
          ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS MOVE_ORD_APPROVAL_STATUS_CD,  
         'I' AS  ACTION_CODE,
         (CASE WHEN NMO.BK_REQUEST_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN  'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS  DML_TYPE	  
 	FROM 
 	( SELECT SCMTRH.MOVE_ORDER_TYPE, SCMTRH.HEADER_STATUS,SCMTRH.REQUEST_NUMBER,SCMTRH.HEADER_ID,SCMTRH.ORGANIZATION_ID
 	FROM
 	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_HEADERS SCMTRH
 	UNION 
 	SELECT ECMTRH.MOVE_ORDER_TYPE,ECMTRH.HEADER_STATUS,ECMTRH.REQUEST_NUMBER,ECMTRH.HEADER_ID,ECMTRH.ORGANIZATION_ID 
 	FROM 
 	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_HEADERS ECMTRH) SECMTRH
 	 	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
	 ON NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT= SECMTRH.Organization_id
        LEFT JOIN  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MOVE_ORDER NMO
         ON ( SECMTRH.REQUEST_NUMBER = NMO.BK_REQUEST_NUM)

SELECT SCMTRH.HEADER_ID,SCMTRH.REQUEST_NUMBER,SCMTRH.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID,SCMTRH.MOVE_ORDER_TYPE,
SCMTRH.ORGANIZATION_ID,SCMTRH.DESCRIPTION,SCMTRH.DATE_REQUIRED,SCMTRH.FROM_SUBINVENTORY_CODE,
SCMTRH.TO_SUBINVENTORY_CODE,SCMTRH.TO_ACCOUNT_ID,SCMTRH.HEADER_STATUS,SCMTRH.STATUS_DATE,
SCMTRH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,SCMTRH.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,SCMTRH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,SCMTRH.CREATED_BY,
SCMTRH.CREATION_DATE,SCMTRH.REQUEST_ID,SCMTRH.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,SCMTRH.PROGRAM_ID,
SCMTRH.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,SCMTRH.GROUPING_RULE_ID,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE1,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE2,
SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE3,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE4,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE5,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE6,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE7,
SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE8,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE9,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE10,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE11,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE12,
SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE13,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE14,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE15,SCMTRH.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,SCMTRH.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID,
SCMTRH.FREIGHT_CODE,SCMTRH.SHIPMENT_METHOD,SCMTRH.AUTO_RECEIPT_FLAG,SCMTRH.REFERENCE_ID,SCMTRH.REFERENCE_DETAIL_ID,
SCMTRH.ASSIGNMENT_ID,
SCMTRH.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCMTRH.SOURCE_DML_TYPE ,                      
SCMTRH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,                      
SCMTRH.REFRESH_DATETIME,
'RI' AS  EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_HEADERS SCMTRH WHERE 
   NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
             WHERE NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT= SCMTRH.ORGANIZATION_ID
      )
